message:
fix(bracket): catch panics from release future during Drop to prevent abort

When a bracket is dropped while in the Releasing phase, the Drop
handler drives the release future to completion via a spin loop.
If the release future panics during poll, this previously caused a
panic-in-drop scenario that aborts the process during unwind.

Wrap each release_fut.poll() call in std::panic::catch_unwind and
silently stop driving the release future on panic, preserving the
invariant that Drop must never panic.

Add PanicRelease test helper and a regression test that verifies:
1. The release panic propagates normally from an explicit poll
2. Dropping the bracket after that panic does NOT panic again

map_reduce.rs: rustfmt reformatting of MapReduceResult::new call
in test_all_succeeded_empty_input (no logic change).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
